html:
Professional Starlink Installation

STARLINK

Starlink's next-generation satellite network delivers fast and reliable connectivity where traditional service is unavailable. We provide professional installation and custom solutions for your unique needs.

What is Starlink?

Starlink is a revolutionary satellite internet constellation developed by SpaceX, providing high-speed, low-latency broadband internet to locations where connectivity has been unreliable, expensive, or completely unavailable.

Starlink Gen 3 Performance

The latest Starlink Gen 3 kit delivers exceptional speeds up to 400 Mbps download and 25 Mbps upload with latency as low as 20-40ms. The compact, weather-resistant dish features Wi-Fi 6 tri-band technology, supports up to 235 devices, and includes a built-in snow-melt heater.

Up to 400 Mbps Wi-Fi 6 Low Latency 235 Devices Weather Resistant

Professional Installation

Our certified technicians provide expert Starlink installation with a focus on quality and longevity. We never puncture roofs. Instead, we mount dishes on fascia boards, gable ends, or custom pole mounts to protect your home while ensuring optimal signal reception and dish positioning.

No Roof Penetration Fascia Mounting Optimal Positioning Clean Cable Runs Weatherproof Install

We Provide All Equipment

You only need to purchase your Starlink kit from the official Starlink website . We supply everything else including professional-grade mounting hardware, extended cables up to 150ft, cable management systems, and weatherproofing materials. No need to source any additional equipment yourself.

Mounting Hardware 150ft Cables Cable Management Weatherproofing All Accessories

Our Premium Equipment

We use only the highest quality mounting solutions and accessories to ensure your Starlink installation stands the test of time.

Professional Mounting Kit

Our sleek black J-arm mount features a strong, adjustable design that's fully compatible with Starlink Gen 3. Perfect for fascia or wall mounting without roof penetration.

150ft Gen 3 Cable

Extended cable runs allow optimal dish placement. Weather-resistant construction ensures reliable performance year-round.

Complete Solutions

From basic residential setups to complex commercial installations, we have the equipment and expertise for any project.

Advanced Network Integration

Extend your Starlink coverage and capabilities with mesh networking and enterprise-grade solutions.

Starlink Mesh Nodes

Official Starlink mesh nodes seamlessly extend your Wi-Fi coverage throughout larger homes and properties, maintaining consistent speeds everywhere.

UniFi Integration

For advanced users, we can integrate Starlink with enterprise-grade UniFi networking equipment for superior control, security, and performance.

Network Security

Professional network configuration includes robust security measures, guest networks, and traffic management to keep your connection safe and optimized.

Why Choose McKee Security?

Professional installation ensures optimal performance and protects your investment.

Expert Installation

Our technicians are trained specifically in Starlink installations, understanding the precise positioning and cable management required for optimal satellite connectivity.

Protect Your Home

We never drill into your roof. Our mounting solutions protect your home's integrity while providing secure, stable dish placement that withstands extreme weather.

Complete Service

From initial site survey to final configuration, we handle everything. You simply purchase your Starlink kit, and we take care of the rest.

Ongoing Support

Need to relocate your dish? Add mesh coverage? Integrate with existing network equipment? We're here to help with all your Starlink needs.

Ready for High-Speed Satellite Internet?

First, order your Starlink kit directly from Starlink. Once you have your delivery date, contact us to schedule your professional installation.

Ready for High-Speed Satellite Internet?

First, order your Starlink kit directly from Starlink. Once you have your delivery date, contact us to schedule your professional installation.
